overall.description: First-person exploration through a snowy mountain river environment in a high-fidelity game engine. The character walks across snow-covered rocks, enters a crystal-clear turquoise river, swims underwater through a rocky channel with aquatic vegetation, and surfaces to swim in the open water surrounded by forested canyon walls.

events.description: reaching the water's edge and preparing to enter the river

agents.ego_description: walking carefully across snow-covered rocks and boulders toward the turquoise river

entered.detail: massive boulder covered in white snow dominating the center of the frame
crystal clear turquoise water of the mountain river becoming visible between rocks
dense coniferous forest covering the canyon walls in the distance
steep rocky canyon walls framing the river valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain riverbank with large snow-covered boulders and rocky terrain. The camera moves forward through the snow, approaching a crystal-clear turquoise river. Evergreen trees and rocky cliffs form the backdrop in this narrow ravine setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: underwater river channel with rocky bed

events.description: entering the water and submerging below the surface into the underwater environment
character's hands wearing fur gauntlets become visible as they begin swimming forward

agents.ego_description: swimming underwater through the clear river, navigating between submerged rocks and aquatic plants

entered.detail: rocky riverbed visible through the clear water with stones and pebbles
patches of green aquatic vegetation growing on the riverbed
light patterns dancing on the underwater surfaces from the sun above

segments.scene_description: The camera submerges into the turquoise water, revealing an underwater world with a rocky riverbed and aquatic grass beds. Light caustics ripple across the submerged stones as the character swims forward, with their fur-covered hands occasionally visible in the lower frame.

events.description: surfacing from underwater to swim on the water surface with sky visible

agents.ego_description: swimming on the water surface while observing the surrounding rocky canyon walls and forest

entered.detail: steep rocky cliffs rising from the water's edge covered in patches of snow
dense green tree canopy lining the top of the canyon walls
bright sky with scattered clouds visible above the canyon

segments.scene_description: The camera breaks the surface, revealing a sunlit mountain river pool surrounded by rocky canyon walls and dense forest. The water is crystal clear with visible stones beneath, while the sky and tree canopy frame the narrow ravine as the character continues swimming forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a frozen mountain riverbank, diving beneath the surface before emerging into a sunlit canyon pool. It begins by moving across snow-covered boulders and rocky terrain toward the edge of a crystal-clear turquoise river framed by evergreen trees and steep cliffs. As the camera submerges, the snowy landscape vanishes, replaced by an underwater world of rocky riverbeds and swaying aquatic grass where light caustics ripple across the stones. The scene then shifts as the camera breaks the surface, transitioning from the muted tones of the depths to a bright, sunlit pool. Finally, the view expands to reveal towering canyon walls and a dense forest canopy as the character continues swimming forward through the transparent water.
